listening.audio: Receptionist welcomes Mr. Tanaka at The Sunrise Resort.
listening.question: What time is breakfast served at the hotel?

listening.audio: Receptionist welcomes Mr. Tanaka at The Sunrise Resort.
listening.question: What is the guest's room number?

listening.audio: Customer books a city tour package.
listening.question: How many people are in the booking?

reading.passage: Welcome to The Sunrise Resort. Check-in time is 2 PM and check-out time is 12 noon. Breakfast is included with your stay and is served at the Lotus Restaurant on the 2nd floor from 7 AM to 10 AM. Free WiFi is available in all rooms.
reading.question: What is the check-out time?

reading.passage: The Mekong Delta day tour includes a boat ride through floating markets, a visit to a coconut candy workshop, lunch at a local family restaurant, and stops at fruit orchards. The tour departs at 7:30 AM and returns to Ho Chi Minh City around 6 PM.
reading.question: Which of the following is NOT part of the tour?

writing.prompt: Viết email trả lời khách yêu cầu xác nhận đặt phòng 2 đêm cho 2 người lớn tại khách sạn 4 sao ở Đà Nẵng, check-in 15/06.
Trả lời email của khách than phiền về việc phòng chưa được dọn dẹp khi check-in.

listening.audio: Manager discusses Q3 sales targets with the team.
listening.question: What growth target is mentioned for Q3?

reading.passage: We propose a strategic partnership to develop adventure tourism products targeting the European market. Initial investment is estimated at 2.5M USD with projected ROI of 18% within 24 months. The partnership leverages our local expertise and your distribution network.
reading.question: What is the projected return on investment timeframe?

writing.prompt: Viết bản memo đề xuất chiến lược mở rộng dịch vụ MICE (Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, Exhibitions) tại thị trường Đông Nam Á.
